notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Gift flow remains from accepted CC7.5.12, with added post-selection manager entry for existing gift.
After choosing a post in Buttons, the bot now detects existing button/gift rows and offers add, edit, or delete instead of blindly starting a new button.
Buttons now support adding an extra CTA button without overwriting the existing primary button, using cta_buttons_json.
Button step 4 old menu is neutralized after user sends the link, so the active review menu should appear at the bottom.
Post patcher now rebuilds comment button, CTA rows, and gift rows together from Postgres and preserves multiple CTA rows.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered through 7510-7514 wrappers. If this build is accepted, next task is to merge admin flows into one clean core module and remove wrappers.
